creator: mjl@luckie.org.nz
text:
Update xfig to 3.2.5c.
Changes at: http://xfig.org/m/art17.html
files/patch-f_wrpng.c and files/patch-f_readpng.c are no long required.
There are a few portlints remaining:

WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a NLS knob to conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: LIB_DEPENDS don't specify the ABI version number .11 in jpeg.11 unless it is really necessary.
WARN: Makefile: LIB_DEPENDS don't specify the ABI version number .8 in Xaw3d.8 unless it is really necessary.
